query_parameters.description: Parameters for the API query (e.g., gene symbols, PMIDs, protein IDs).

ncbi_api_key.description: Optional API key for NCBI E-utilities to increase rate limit to 10 req/s.

batch_size.description: Number of records to fetch per batch (must be <= 500 for NCBI).

use_history_server.description: Whether to use the Entrez History Server for NCBI queries.
